content.seo_title: For Students: Passive Income to Solve Coding Bugs (Beginner)
content.seo_description: Learn how to generate passive income and overcome debugging hurdles. A beginner-level checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code for student developers.
content.answer_block: Debugging barriers vanish when you pivot to AI-automated micro-SaaS. By leveraging Claude Code for rapid development and Antigravity for architecture, you transform code errors from blockers into learning milestones. Build automated, low-maintenance products that generate passive income while you master the logic behind the automated output.
content.intro:
The screen glows with a cryptic stack trace, the cursor blinking like a heartbeat in the dark. For the student builder, the 'can't debug' wall isn't just a technical hurdle; it is a creative paralysis that threatens to end your project before it truly begins. You feel the weight of every unclosed bracket, wondering if you are truly cut out for this.

But what if that frustration was actually the signal to evolve? By shifting your focus from manual debugging to building automated passive income streams, you stop fighting the code and start orchestrating it. This isn't just about finishing an app—it's about building a digital asset that earns for you while you sleep, turning your 'can't debug' moments into a masterclass in AI-assisted engineering.

steps.title: Define Your Micro-SaaS Niche
steps.description: Identify a small, high-pain problem for a specific audience. Focus on one feature that solves a recurring issue.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a senior SaaS architect. Analyze current micro-niche trends in productivity tools. Suggest 5 low-code app ideas with high passive income potential for a student developer.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Research 5 micro-SaaS niches that require minimal maintenance and list their primary value propositions.'

steps.title: Architect the MVP Structure
steps.description: Use Antigravity to map out your database schema and API routes before writing a single line of implementation code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust, scalable folder structure and database schema for a subscription-based micro-SaaS. Include authentication and payment gateway integration logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a Next.js project structure based on the schema provided by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Implement AI-Assisted Logic
steps.description: Instead of manual debugging, have Claude Code write the unit tests for your core business logic first, ensuring code quality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests for my core logic. Ensure the code is modular and easy to debug using standard logging practices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Write and run unit tests for the user authentication and subscription service modules.'

steps.title: Automate Deployment Pipelines
steps.description: Set up a CI/CD pipeline so your code is automatically tested and deployed, removing the risk of manual deployment errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a GitHub Actions workflow that automates testing, linting, and deployment to Vercel for my micro-SaaS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a .github/workflows/deploy.yml file that handles automated testing and production builds.'

steps.title: Launch and Monetize
steps.description: Integrate a payment provider like Stripe and set up your landing page to start accepting users immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a checklist for integrating Stripe Checkout and setting up a basic landing page that converts visitors to users.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Explain the steps to connect a Stripe webhook to my backend for processing successful subscription events.'

pro_tips: Treat every bug as a prompt engineering opportunity; if you can't debug it, your prompt to the AI wasn't specific enough.
Ship the MVP in 48 hours; passive income is built on volume and iteration, not perfection.
Use 'Explain like I'm a senior dev' as a prefix to your prompts to get more concise, high-level code output.
Automate your feedback loop by integrating a simple logging service like Sentry; let the app tell you what's broken before the user does.
Focus on 'Read-Only' revenue streams: tools that aggregate data or provide reports are easier to maintain than complex interactive dashboards.
content.next_steps: Once your first micro-SaaS is live, monitor your logs for 7 days to identify the most frequent 'errors'. Use those errors to build your next tool—a debugging assistant for other students.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact workflow to bypass the coding barriers that stop most students. Don't let a missing semicolon define your potential. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
